title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bajaj Auto - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bajaj Auto - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Bajaj Auto in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Auto:
Bajaj Auto is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Auto!
